$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Revocation Management CRL rules and Registry Interface CRL response rules. The CRL uses the same detached-signature envelope pattern as the Registry Trust Record: signatures are computed over the JCS canonical serialization of the signed object only.
title: AIP Certificate Revocation List
description: Signed JSON CRL document returned by GET /v1/crl and by the signed Registry Trust Record endpoints.crl URI. This is an AIP revocation artifact, not an RFC 5280 X.509 CRL.

registry_id.description: Registry identifier. MUST equal the accepted Registry Trust Record signed.registry_id.

trust_record_version.description: Registry Trust Record version whose active_verification_keys.crl verifies this CRL.

crl_id.description: Unique identifier for this CRL publication.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the CRL was issued.

next_update.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp after which Relying Parties MUST NOT use this CRL for new validations. MUST be no later than 15 minutes after issued_at.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing CRL sequence number per Registry.

publication_mode.description: complete: revocations contains the full active CRL. index: revocations is empty and segments lists signed CRL segment documents. segment: revocations contains only the Revocation Objects assigned to segment_id.

revocation_count.description: Number of active Revocation Objects represented by this CRL document. For an index document, this is the total across all referenced segments. For a segment document, this is the number in the segment.

segment_id.description: Present when publication_mode is segment. Identifies the CRL segment within crl_id.

partition_key_alg.description: Present when publication_mode is index or segment. Partition key algorithm for segmented CRLs.

uri.description: Relative path or absolute HTTPS URI returning the signed CRL segment document.

first_partition_key.description: Inclusive lower bound over lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 target_id partition keys.

last_partition_key.description: Inclusive upper bound over lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 target_id partition keys.

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the JCS canonicalization of the full signed CRL segment document.

segments.description: Present when publication_mode is index. Segment references for a segmented CRL.

revocations.description: Full signed Revocation Objects active for bounded-staleness validation at issued_at.

keyid.description: MUST match an active_verification_keys.crl JWK keyid in the referenced Registry Trust Record.

sig.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the JCS canonical serialization of the signed object.
